## Artifacts

- [ ] `README.md`
- [ ] `FORMALIZATION_PLAN.md`
- [ ] `DependencyDAG.tex`
- [ ] `DependencyDAG.pdf`
- [ ] `MainTheorems.lean`
- [ ] `PaperInterface.lean`
- [ ] `papers/<PaperName>/status.json`
- [ ] regenerated `papers/status.json`

Do not attach or commit source PDFs/text caches unless redistribution rights
have been checked separately.
